entry.title: New: BFED-59 Bill 83 (2026) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILL 83 (2026), AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET: DEPARTMENT OF ENVIRONMENTAL MANAGEMENT, SEWER FUND; AND APPENDIX A, PART II, OPEN SPACE, NATURAL RESOURCES, CULTURAL RESOURCES, AND SCENIC VIEWS PRESERVATION FUND (BFED-59)

Budget, Finance, and Economic Development Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
